sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110992" key="filhlia/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-ηλῐάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἥλιος</etym>) <sense id="n110992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the sun,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ᾠδή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0369.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telesill.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
